title: Data set
description: Logically meaningful collection of similar or related data with shared characteristics—such as source, processing level, or resolution—grouped to meet specific coverage or revisit requirements.

definitions.definition: Logically meaningful collection of similar or related data with shared characteristics—such as source, processing level, or resolution—grouped to meet specific coverage or revisit requirements.
